review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: Ambuja Cement is known for its strength and durability, making it suitable for construction of strong buildings and structures. It has a low heat of hydration, which means it produces less heat during the curing process, reducing the risk of cracks in the structure. The brand has a good reputation in the market and is widely available across the country. Ambuja Cement has a wide range of products, including specialized cement for different applications, such as marine structures, high-rise buildings, and precast concrete.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: The cost of Ambuja Cement is relatively higher compared to other brands of cement available in the market. The brand has faced criticism in the past for its environmental practices, including the use of non-renewable resources and pollution caused by its manufacturing processes. Some customers have reported issues with the quality and consistency of the cement, such as uneven curing and cracking in the structure.

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: I have wonderful start of my career with this company, it felt like home always. My new propositions were warmly encouraged by the senior management and I was kept highly motivated to bring innovation in the organisation. It offers you a promising career ahead, if you are willing to take challenges. There's no time restriction in this company, but your result matters a lot in your appraisal process. Rather being age of employees on higher side, but young guns are given freedom to do their style of working and are highly relied on even key projects.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: There HR department is bit disappointing, They are high on planning side but some I feel their execution is not even 50% of their planning, there co-ordination with other departments regarding employee training and development is very poor. Employee has to struggle himself even to get to know whats going in the company and HR is not that much supportive many times regarding the development of the employee.

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: Good exposure of mechanical , chemical and E&I engineers . Training is world class. When it comes to cement industry I would rank Ambuja Cement as No 2 in India in terms of innovation. Despite many cons, Ambuja Cement is leader in Occupational Health & Safety.

1) The hiring panel projected a very highy package and in realy you barely get penuts in hand. 

2) Most managers and high ranking officials are related to thermal plant heads (Fly ash suppliers). They are incompetent. 

3) Culture is bad! Very Bad!!

4) Safety regulations are just in papers. You often see drunk / smoking managers in plant premises. They do not have any sense of speaking to any one. 

5) HR is not welcoming to suggestions. They even refused to give experience letter in required format. Had to write to Delhi office to get one. 

6) Just 1 and half year of misery in remote locations and terrible accomodation.
